---
title: "City of Moses Lake, Washington Waste Collection Cost of Service Study"
subtitle: "2016"
number: 10
image: /images/skagit-wa.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Skagit County, Washington"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

:::
